summary: Guardian AI Decision Engine - All backend tests (21/21) PASSED. Frontend Escalation Dashboard renders correctly with Escalation Rules card showing L1/L2/L3 timers (5/10/15 min), Pending Escalations card (showing 'All clear' when no pending), and Escalation History card with response times. Sidebar shows 'Escalation AI' navigation item with Shield icon.

escalation_config: test_escalation_config_has_levels - PASS: L1=Primary Guardian, L2=Secondary Contacts, L3=All Operators
test_escalation_config_has_l1_only_types - PASS: device_offline, low_battery, signal_degradation, reboot_anomaly, device_instability
escalation_pending: test_escalation_pending_item_structure - PASS: incident_id, senior_name, device_identifier, next_escalation_level, time_remaining_seconds, overdue
escalation_history: test_escalation_history_item_structure - PASS: response_time_min, acknowledged_by, acknowledged_at present
acknowledge_incident: test_acknowledge_incident_success - PASS (or skipped if no unacknowledged incidents)

escalation_rules_card.level1: 5 min - Primary Guardian - email, sms, push, sse
escalation_rules_card.level3: 15 min - All Operators - email, sms, push

incidents_page.acknowledge_button_location: Shows in expanded row for open unacknowledged incidents
incidents_page.current_state: All open incidents are at L3 (fully escalated) or L1-only types, so acknowledge section appears for unacknowledged ones

returns.levels: L1=Primary Guardian, L2=Secondary Contacts, L3=All Operators with channels

returns.pending: array - unacknowledged incidents with next_escalation_level, time_remaining_seconds, overdue

GET /api/operator/escalation/pending.filter_behavior: Excludes acknowledged incidents and fully-escalated L3 incidents

GET /api/operator/escalation/history.returns: array of recent escalated incidents with response_time_min, acknowledged_by, escalation_level

escalation_scheduler_filter.behavior: Queries include Incident.acknowledged_at.is_(None) - acknowledged incidents are NOT re-escalated

context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian AI Decision Engine fully tested. 4 API endpoints (config, pending, history, acknowledge) verified. EscalationDashboard.jsx renders correctly with Rules/Pending/History cards. Sidebar shows 'Escalation AI' with Shield icon. Acknowledge button shows in Incidents page expanded rows for open unacknowledged incidents. Escalation scheduler correctly filters acknowledged incidents (acknowledged_at IS NULL in L1/L2/L3 queries).
